seoTitle: Fumina South vs Fyans Creek — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Fumina South and Fyans Creek. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Fumina South vs Fyans Creek: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Fumina South and Fyans Creek.
heading: Fumina South vs Fyans Creek — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Fumina South, Victoria and Fyans Creek, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Fyans Creek has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Fumina South (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Fumina South or Fyans Creek safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Fumina South has a flood risk score of 29/100, while Fyans Creek scores 23/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Fumina South scores 60/100 for bushfire risk. Fyans Creek scores 16/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Fumina South or Fyans Creek?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Fyans Creek has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.73% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
